case_title: JOSE A VASQUEZ VS. ALEXIS MUNGUIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY VASQUEZ, JOSE A AS TO DEFENDANT MUNGUIA, ALEXIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE) (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, JOSE A
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, JOSE A
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00<WAIVER>) SERVED AUG-10-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MUNGUIA, ALEXIS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---DANIEL NAVARRO. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
